name: 安全哨兵
description: 每周日9点→安全审计快照→与上周diff→新TCC授权/登录项/监听端口告警。新软件要权限无处遁形

steps.args: -c 'D=~/.myagents/projects/mino/workspace/security-snapshots; mkdir -p $D; bash ~/.myagents/projects/mino/.claude/skills/macos-automation/scripts/mac-security-audit.sh > $D/$(date +%F).audit; L=$(ls -t $D/*.audit|sed -n 2p); [ -n "$L" ] && diff $L $D/$(date +%F).audit | grep -E "^>.*(TCC|授权|登录项|LaunchAgent|监听)" | head -20'
steps.description: 审计+与上周快照diff提取新增风险项

feedback.detail: 有新增风险项时告警, 无则静默
